operations.exit_load: Exit Load: 1%- If redeemed on or before 15 days from the date of allotment.
operations.taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
